title: hibiscus surattensis var. mastersianus
intro: Hibiscus surattensis var. mastersianus, also known as the Chinese rose mallow or Master's hibiscus, is a variety of the hibiscus surattensis plant, a species of flowering plant in the mallow family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of hibiscus surattensis var. mastersianus include lowering blood pressure, reducing cholesterol levels, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. It is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in herbal remedies such as capsules or tinctures.
